name: Calzones
recipeInstructions:
Choose your favorite method for making dough. While you're waiting, combine the tomatoes, garlic, and basil, and set aside.
Divide the dough into two balls. Roll one ball into a circle approximately 12 inches in diameter. Layer half of the circle with parmesan cheese, chicken, tomato mixture, and a generous amount of crumbled feta. Fold the crust over and seal the edges securely.
Repeat with the other half of the dough. Place the calzones on a baking sheet.
Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown. Brush the crusts with melted butter before serving.
This makes two good-sized calzones.
